entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: An important pulse crop of Indian rainfed agriculture

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where pigeonpea is grown

entities.name: CENTRAL AND SOUTHERN INDIA
entities.description: Regions contributing significantly to pigeonpea area and production

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: Measure of output per unit area, noted as unacceptably low for pigeonpea

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: Amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD SENSITIVITY
entities.description: Sensitivity to the length of day/night, hindering seed production

entities.name: THERMOPERIOD SENSITIVITY
entities.description: Sensitivity to temperature cycles, hindering seed production

entities.name: PERENNIALITY
entities.description: The quality of living for several years, hindering seed production

entities.name: QUALITY SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing high-quality seeds

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology based on out-crossing and CGMS to break yield plateaus

entities.name: NATURAL OUT-CROSSING
entities.description: A method used in hybrid breeding

entities.name: CGMS SYSTEMS
entities.description: Cytoplasmic nuclear and genetic male-sterility systems used for hybrid breeding

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: Research institute where hybrid breeding technology was developed

entities.name: PJTSAU
entities.description: Research institute where hybrid breeding technology was developed

entities.name: ICPH 2740
entities.description: An outstanding pigeonpea hybrid with high yield

entities.name: ASHA
entities.description: A ruling pigeonpea variety used as a control

entities.name: GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: A recent innovation used for pigeonpea improvement

entities.name: PHOTO INSENSITIVITY
entities.description: A trait developed in super early maturing lines

entities.name: EARLY MATURING
entities.description: A trait developed in super early maturing lines

entities.name: CLEISTOGAMOUS FLOWER STRUCTURE
entities.description: A trait introgressed to maintain genetic purity

entities.name: GENETIC PURITY
entities.description: The consistency of the genetic makeup of a line

entities.name: OBCORDATE LEAF SHAPE
entities.description: A trait used as a NEP to assess genetic purity

entities.name: NEP
entities.description: Nuclear Explicit Phenotype used to assess genetic purity

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: A trait developed in hybrids and elite breeding lines
